creator: mshirk@daemon-security.com
text:
URL:
https://www.meetup.com/CharmBUG

EMAIL: 
shirkdog@gmail.com

DESCRIPTION:
CharmBUG is a Baltimore Area BSD Operating System User Group, where the focus is on FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD and DragonFlyBSD, including system administration and security across all UNIX like operating systems.
